title: App Registry
description: Register and manage every satellite app in the constellation — client credentials, redirect URIs, required roles, and lifecycle status.

table.emptyCta: Register your first satellite app to enable SSO.

form.createDescription: Add a satellite app so users can SSO into it from the dashboard.
form.editDescription: Update registration details. Changes apply immediately.

name.label: Name
name.hint: Lowercase identifier — letters, numbers, hyphens only.

displayName.label: Display Name
displayName.hint: Shown to users on dashboard tiles.

homeUrl.label: Home URL
homeUrl.hint: Where users land when clicking the tile.

requiredRoles.label: Required Roles
requiredRoles.hint: Users must have at least one of these roles to access the app.

redirectUris.label: Redirect URIs
redirectUris.hint: OAuth redirect_uri whitelist. At least one required.

name.minLength: Name must be at least 2 characters.
name.invalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
name.exists: An app with this name already exists.

displayName.minLength: Display name must be at least 2 characters.
displayName.maxLength: Display name must not exceed 80 characters.

iconUrl.invalid: Must start with http:// or https://

homeUrl.invalid: Must start with http:// or https://

redirectUris.required: Add at least one redirect URI.
redirectUris.invalid: Must start with http:// or https://

hide.title: Hide {name}?
hide.description: This pauses the app — it stays in the registry but is hidden from users' dashboards. You can unhide it anytime.

toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

secretDialog.title: App registered — copy your credentials
secretDialog.description: Share these with the app's developer to configure OAuth. The client secret is shown only once.
secretDialog.warning: Store the client secret now — it will not be shown again.
